texts.desc:
You can only use the ② effect of this card's name thrice per turn.
①：This card's name becomes "Toon World" while in the Field Zone.
②：Once per turn: You can add 1 "Toon" card, or 1 card that mentions a "Toon" card's name, from your Deck to your hand.
③：Before resolving another activated card or effect, you can banish 1 Toon monster you control until immediately after that card/effect resolves, also you cannot banish monsters with that same original name with this effect of this card's name for the rest of this turn.
texts.name: Toon World the Perfect World
